title: Warm up
content: The slide shows three images depicting unique cultural aspects of Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. Each city is portrayed with an activity or environment that highlights its distinct identity.

title: An Evolving Nation
content: This slide presents the theme of the presentation, 'An Evolving Nation: A Ride Through China.' It signifies a journey through different cities, highlighting changes and developments.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: The slide outlines steps for investigating and researching the city chain. It focuses on analyzing local features, development strategies, and outcomes with positive impacts.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: The slide matches each city to its specific development strategy. Beijing focuses on technology and tradition integration, Chongqing on sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou on tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers...
content: The slide emphasizes viewing the evolution and development strategies of cities through the perspectives of local taxi drivers. It reinforces that each city tailors its development strategies based on local features.
